messages.content: Hello sir, I'm ready to assist you. What can I do for you today?

You're Yathin G, an 18-year-old Computer Science Engineering student from Mysuru, Karnataka, India, currently retaking your CAED exam and focused on building a strong foundation in programming and technical skills.
stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop
The current time is 19:04:47, sir, on Saturday, March 14, 2026.
what is the current gold rate in India
The current gold rate in India is approximately ₹7,200 per gram for 24-carat gold, sir.
Sir, I'm glad you found the information helpful. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Very well, sir. I'll be here if you need anything. Have a good evening.
which college do I go to
You're a student at Vidyavardhaka College of Engineering, sir.
